history.en: One of the oldest Arctic sled dogs, developed by the native Mahlemut Inuit tribe of northwestern Alaska. Essential for survival, used for hauling heavy freight across Arctic terrain, hunting large predators like seals and polar bears
history.zh: 最古老的北极雪橇犬之一，由阿拉斯加西北部的原住民马勒缪特因纽特部落培育。对生存至关重要，用于在北极地形上拖运重物、狩猎海豹和北极熊等大型捕食者。

overview.en: The Alaskan Malamute is a powerful, majestic working breed known for its strength, endurance, and affectionate nature. Bred by the Mahlemut Inuit to haul heavy loads across Arctic ice, they are intelligent, loyal, and incredibly friendly, but also independent and strong-willed. Their playful, outgoing personality makes them wonderful companions for active families, though their high energy and need for purpose mean they are not couch potatoes. Malamutes thrive on human interaction and can be vocal, often howling rather than barking. They are generally good-natured but require consistent leadership to manage their stubborn streak. Their thick double coat and wolf-like appearance demand regular grooming, and their exercise needs are substantial. Overall, the Malamute is a devoted, hardworking dog best suited for owners who can provide ample physical activity, mental stimulation, and a firm yet loving hand.
overview.zh: 阿拉斯加雪橇犬是一种强壮、威武的工作犬种，以力量、耐力和深情的天性著称。由马勒缪特因纽特人培育，用于在北极冰原上拖运重物，它们聪明、忠诚且极其友善，但也独立且意志坚定。其活泼外向的性格使其成为活跃家庭的绝佳伴侣，但由于精力旺盛且需要目标感，它们并非懒散的宠物。阿拉斯加雪橇犬渴望与人互动，叫声独特，常以嚎叫代替犬吠。它们通常性情温和，但需要坚定的领导来管理其固执的一面。厚重的双层被毛和类似狼的外表要求定期梳理，运动需求也相当大。总体而言，阿拉斯加雪橇犬是一种忠诚且勤奋的狗，最适合能提供充足身体活动、精神刺激以及坚定而充满爱意的指导的主人。

care.en: Daily care for an Alaskan Malamute revolves around grooming, exercise, and health checks. Their thick double coat sheds heavily twice a year, requiring daily brushing during shedding seasons and at least 2–3 times weekly otherwise. Bathe only when necessary to preserve natural oils. Exercise is non-negotiable: aim for at least 60–90 minutes of vigorous activity daily, including pulling, hiking, or running. Without sufficient exercise, they may become destructive or anxious. Regular vet visits every 6–12 months are essential to monitor for hip dysplasia, cataracts, and bloat. Nail trimming every 3–4 weeks, ear cleaning weekly, and dental care (brushing or dental chews) should be part of the routine. In hot weather, provide shade and cool water, and avoid strenuous exercise during peak heat. Malamutes are cold-weather dogs and must never be left outside unsupervised in extreme temperatures.
care.zh: 阿拉斯加雪橇犬的日常护理围绕梳理、运动和健康检查展开。其厚重的双层被毛每年严重脱毛两次，换毛季需每日梳理，其他时间每周至少2-3次。仅在必要时洗澡，以保护天然油脂。运动是必须的：每天至少进行60-90分钟的剧烈活动，包括拉拽、远足或跑步。运动不足可能导致破坏性或焦虑行为。每6-12个月定期进行兽医检查，以监测髋关节发育不良、白内障和胃扭转。每3-4周修剪指甲，每周清洁耳朵，以及牙齿护理（刷牙或使用洁齿骨）应成为日常。炎热天气时提供阴凉和凉水，避免在高温时段剧烈运动。阿拉斯加雪橇犬是耐寒犬种，绝不能在极端天气下无人看管地留在户外。

training.en: Training an Alaskan Malamute requires patience, consistency, and positive reinforcement. They are highly intelligent but also independent and stubborn, often challenging authority. Start socialization and basic obedience early, using reward-based methods like treats, praise, and play. Harsh corrections can damage trust and lead to resistance. Focus on commands such as 'come,' 'stay,' and 'leave it,' as their strong prey drive and wandering instincts can be risky off-leash. Malamutes excel in pulling sports like sledding or weight pulling, which channel their natural drive. Keep training sessions short (10–15 minutes) and varied to hold their interest. They respond well to leadership that is calm and assertive, not aggressive. Crate training is recommended for safety and management. Consistency from all family members is crucial to prevent mixed messages. Avoid repetitive drills; instead, incorporate training into daily walks and play.
training.zh: 训练阿拉斯加雪橇犬需要耐心、一致性和正向强化。它们非常聪明，但也独立且固执，常挑战权威。尽早开始社交化和基础服从训练，使用基于奖励的方法，如零食、表扬和游戏。严厉的纠正会损害信任并导致抗拒。重点训练‘过来’、‘等待’和‘放下’等指令，因为其强烈的捕猎本能和漫游天性在无牵引时可能带来风险。阿拉斯加雪橇犬擅长拉拽运动，如雪橇或负重拉拽，这能疏导其天生动力。保持训练简短（10-15分钟）且多样化，以维持其兴趣。它们对冷静而坚定、而非攻击性的领导方式反应良好。建议使用笼内训练以确保安全和管理。所有家庭成员保持一致至关重要，以避免信息混乱。避免重复性的练习，而应将训练融入日常散步和游戏中。

diet.en: The Alaskan Malamute thrives on a high-quality, protein-rich diet formulated for active or working breeds. Their daily food intake depends on age, size, and activity level, but adult Malamutes typically need 3–5 cups of dry food per day, split into two meals. Avoid overfeeding, as this breed is prone to bloat (gastric dilatation-volvulus) — feed smaller, frequent meals and avoid vigorous exercise immediately after eating. Include healthy fats like fish oil for coat and joint health, and consider joint supplements (glucosamine, chondroitin) for older dogs. Fresh water must always be available. Puppies should eat three to four times daily until six months, then transition to two meals. Avoid grains or fillers if your dog has sensitivities; many Malamutes do well on grain-free or limited-ingredient diets. Treats should be limited and used primarily for training. Consult your vet for specific calorie needs, especially during seasonal coat changes when energy demands may vary.
diet.zh: 阿拉斯加雪橇犬适合食用专为活跃或工作犬种设计的高品质、高蛋白饮食。每日食量取决于年龄、体型和活动水平，但成年阿拉斯加雪橇犬通常每天需要3-5杯干粮，分两餐喂食。避免过量喂食，因为该犬种易患胃扭转（胃扩张-扭转）——应少食多餐，并避免进食后立即剧烈运动。加入健康脂肪如鱼油，以维护皮毛和关节健康，老年犬可考虑关节补充剂（葡萄糖胺、软骨素）。必须随时提供新鲜饮水。幼犬在六个月前应每日喂食三到四次，之后过渡到两餐。如果您的狗有敏感问题，避免谷物或填充物；许多阿拉斯加雪橇犬适合无谷物或限定成分饮食。零食应限量并主要用于训练。请咨询兽医以确定具体热量需求，尤其是在季节性换毛期间，能量需求可能变化。

livingTips.en: Alaskan Malamutes are not ideal for apartment living due to their size, energy, and need for space. A home with a securely fenced yard is strongly recommended, as they are escape artists and may dig or climb. They thrive in cooler climates and can struggle in hot, humid environments — always provide air conditioning and shade. Malamutes are generally good with children, especially when raised with them, but their large size and boisterous play may accidentally knock over small kids. Supervision is advised. They can coexist with other dogs if properly socialized, but same-sex aggression may occur. Their strong prey drive makes them unsafe around small pets like cats, rabbits, or rodents unless raised together from puppyhood. Daily mental stimulation (puzzle toys, obedience work) is as important as physical exercise. They are not guard dogs, as they are friendly to strangers, but will alert you to activity. Overall, they need an owner who can dedicate time, space, and leadership.
livingTips.zh: 阿拉斯加雪橇犬因其体型、精力和空间需求，不适合公寓生活。强烈建议拥有带安全围栏的院子，因为它们是逃跑高手，可能挖洞或攀爬。它们在较冷气候中茁壮成长，在炎热潮湿环境中可能不适应——务必提供空调和阴凉。阿拉斯加雪橇犬通常对孩子友好，尤其是从小一起长大的情况下，但其巨大的体型和喧闹的玩耍可能意外撞倒小孩，建议进行监护。如果社交化得当，它们可以与其他犬类共存，但可能出现同性攻击。强烈的捕猎本能使其在小宠物（如猫、兔子或啮齿动物）周围不安全，除非从幼犬时期一起饲养。每日的精神刺激（益智玩具、服从训练）与身体锻炼同等重要。它们不是护卫犬，对陌生人友善，但会提醒您有活动。总体而言，它们需要能投入时间、空间和领导力的主人。
